apps.name: Pinball
apps.desc: Neon space pinball. Hold either side of the screen to work the flippers.

apps.name: Dice
apps.desc: Two big dice on a felt table. Tap to roll, or switch to a single die.

apps.name: Reaction
apps.desc: Tap when the box turns green. Shows your milliseconds and your best ever.

apps.name: Score
apps.desc: Keep score for 2-4 players. Saves as you go.

apps.name: Tally
apps.desc: Four counters that remember their totals. Tap to count.

apps.name: Convert
apps.desc: Miles, temperature, weight and volume. Type it, read it.

apps.name: Intervals
apps.desc: Repeating work/rest timer with beeps. For workouts.

apps.name: Breathe
apps.desc: Box breathing: in 4, hold 4, out 4, hold 4. Follow the square.

apps.name: Starfield
apps.desc: Fly through 220 stars. Drag to steer, tap WARP for speed.
